/usr/bin/c++  -arch arm64 -Wl,-search_paths_first -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names CMakeFiles/test_sound_processor.dir/src/app/application.cpp.o CMakeFiles/test_sound_processor.dir/src/args/args_parser.cpp.o CMakeFiles/test_sound_processor.dir/src/converter/converter.cpp.o CMakeFiles/test_sound_processor.dir/src/filter_producers/filter_producers.cpp.o CMakeFiles/test_sound_processor.dir/src/pipeline/pipeline.cpp.o CMakeFiles/test_sound_processor.dir/src/waveform/waveform.cpp.o CMakeFiles/test_sound_processor.dir/src/wav/wav_io.cpp.o CMakeFiles/test_sound_processor.dir/src/filters/ampl_filter.cpp.o CMakeFiles/test_sound_processor.dir/src/filters/normalize_filter.cpp.o CMakeFiles/test_sound_processor.dir/src/filters/silence_filter.cpp.o CMakeFiles/test_sound_processor.dir/src/filters/timestretch_filter.cpp.o CMakeFiles/test_sound_processor.dir/src/filters/lowpass_filter.cpp.o CMakeFiles/test_sound_processor.dir/src/filters/highpass_filter.cpp.o CMakeFiles/test_sound_processor.dir/src/filters/bandpass_filter.cpp.o CMakeFiles/test_sound_processor.dir/src/filters/reject_filter.cpp.o CMakeFiles/test_sound_processor.dir/src/filters/generator_filters.cpp.o CMakeFiles/test_sound_processor.dir/src/filters/mute_filter.cpp.o CMakeFiles/test_sound_processor.dir/src/filters/mix_filter.cpp.o CMakeFiles/test_sound_processor.dir/tests/sound_processor_tests/test_args_parser.cpp.o CMakeFiles/test_sound_processor.dir/tests/sound_processor_tests/test_waveform.cpp.o CMakeFiles/test_sound_processor.dir/tests/sound_processor_tests/test_filters.cpp.o CMakeFiles/test_sound_processor.dir/tests/sound_processor_tests/test_main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/test_sound_processor.dir/tests/sound_processor_tests/test_pipeline.cpp.o CMakeFiles/test_sound_processor.dir/tests/sound_processor_tests/test_wav_io.cpp.o -o test_sound_processor  -lcontrib_catch2_main
